results.title: Brazil and Haiti fans celebrate together after World Cup match
results.description: Fans of Brazil and Haiti’s national soccer teams celebrated together as they left Lincoln Financial Field in Philadelphia on Friday evening.

results.title: AUS-W vs NED-W Live Streaming Details: When And Where to Watch ICC Women’s T20 World Cup 2026 Match Live in India, Australia, Netherlands And Worldwide
results.description: Australia's women's cricket team will look to continue their rampant run when they meet the Netherlands in the ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026 game at the Rose Bowl in Southampton on June 20, Saturday. With another win, Australia can seemingly cement their spot in the semi-finals too. The post AUS-W vs NED-W Live Streaming Details: When And Where to Watch ICC Women’s T20 World Cup 2026 Match Live in India, Australia, Netherlands And Worldwide appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .
